name: Normal Load
description: Smooth, predictable normal-day traffic for Search Ranking. There is no surprise spike: demand rises through the morning, plateaus during business hours, and tapers at night. The platform should right-size Search replicas with the diurnal curve while keeping the workload SLA-safe.

traffic_windows.label: Late-night baseline
traffic_windows.event: normal off-peak Search traffic; platform runs the minimum safe fleet

traffic_windows.label: Early ramp
traffic_windows.event: traffic rises gradually and remains inside one-replica target capacity

traffic_windows.label: Morning ramp
traffic_windows.event: observed max-pod GPU approaches Search's 50% target but does not breach it

traffic_windows.label: Midday scale-up
traffic_windows.event: Search max-pod GPU crosses the 50% utilization target; platform adds one replica

traffic_windows.label: Business-hours plateau
traffic_windows.event: smooth daily peak remains well below fixed-fleet capacity

traffic_windows.label: Afternoon taper
traffic_windows.event: traffic starts tapering, but still needs daytime Search capacity

traffic_windows.label: Evening browse
traffic_windows.event: moderate evening traffic stays served with daytime capacity

traffic_windows.label: Night scale-down
traffic_windows.event: Search max-pod GPU is sustained low after the evening taper; platform scales back down

key_events.evidence: simulated max-pod GPU is 22.5%, below the 50% Search target on 1 active replica
key_events.outcome: platform scales below the fixed two-replica fleet while serving all traffic

key_events.decision: scale up with normal daily Search demand
key_events.evidence: simulated max-pod GPU reaches 62.5%, above the 50% Search target on the pre-scale fleet.
key_events.outcome: platform moves from 1 to 2 active replicas before any SLA risk appears

key_events.decision: scale down after the normal taper
key_events.evidence: simulated max-pod GPU on the two-replica fleet falls to 16.2%; after scale-down it is roughly 32.5%, still below the 50% target.
key_events.outcome: cost falls with predictable traffic while the workload remains SLA-safe
